criteria.reason: `src/App.tsx:1253` renders a dedicated `session-panel-area` beside the existing project/session list, `src/App.tsx:1266` shows an explicit no-session empty state, and the rerun Playwright flow revalidated both states in `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:89` through `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:95`.

The selected-session workspace is rendered as flat bordered surfaces without rounded shells or shadows in `src/App.tsx:1254`, `src/components/ui/panel-shell.tsx:19`, and `src/App.tsx:1345`, while `src/styles.css:23`, `src/styles.css:64`, and `src/styles.css:68` remove residual radius from shared primitives; current source review found no card-within-card styling in the session workspace path.

Session status, OpenCode status, sandbox mode, Docker availability, runtime context, and start/stop controls are all consolidated in the header at `src/App.tsx:1281` through `src/App.tsx:1339`, while the Agent panel body only renders chat/fallback messaging in `src/components/agent-panel.tsx:17` through `src/components/agent-panel.tsx:57` with no duplicated status cards or log console.

The panel rail is a horizontal non-wrapping strip with `overflow-x-auto` at `src/App.tsx:1372` through `src/App.tsx:1380`, each panel wrapper is full-height, and overflowing panel content stays internal via `src/components/agent-panel.tsx:50`, `src/components/file-tree.tsx:88`, `src/App.tsx:801`, `src/App.tsx:847`, `src/App.tsx:937`, and `src/App.tsx:1065`; the rerun e2e suite rechecked the rail CSS and side-by-side geometry in `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:95` through `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:97` and `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:208` through `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:216`.

Only `agent` is in the default panel set at `src/App.tsx:29`, active session state rehydrates with agent pinned at `src/App.tsx:176` through `src/App.tsx:177`, and additional panels are user-opened through explicit toggle controls at `src/App.tsx:1345` through `src/App.tsx:1367`; the rerun Playwright flow confirmed the default agent-only state in `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:99` through `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:103`.

The Agent panel derives its URL from the existing session runtime port in `src/App.tsx:121` through `src/App.tsx:127` and `src/App.tsx:187`, then embeds that existing OpenCode server via iframe in `src/components/agent-panel.tsx:49` through `src/components/agent-panel.tsx:56`; backend startup still uses the existing OpenCode serve flow in `server/web-backend.js:930` through `server/web-backend.js:1005`, and `src/types/big-ide.ts:103` through `src/types/big-ide.ts:147` show no new chat API contract.

File rows dispatch `onOpenFile` from `src/components/file-tree.tsx:60` through `src/components/file-tree.tsx:71`, `openFile` forces an existing-or-new Editor panel open at `src/App.tsx:278` through `src/App.tsx:285`, and editor tabs are activated from per-session state in `src/App.tsx:801` through `src/App.tsx:837`; the rerun e2e path reverified the README click opens the Editor and activates the correct tab in `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:192` through `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:205`.

Visible workspace content is derived from `activeSession` at `src/App.tsx:166` through `src/App.tsx:188`, per-session editor state is keyed by session id at `src/App.tsx:142`, `src/App.tsx:242` through `src/App.tsx:246`, and session clicks continue to drive the active workspace at `src/App.tsx:1212` through `src/App.tsx:1225`; `git diff -- src/types/big-ide.ts server/web-backend.js` returned no changes, so the current task state does not alter backend API contracts or session identity handling.

`e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:85` through `e2e/usage-recordings.spec.ts:267` now cover the selected-session workspace area, default agent-only state, horizontal rail behavior, agent chat surface, Docker-requested startup flow, and Files-to-Editor activation with stable `data-testid` selectors; the fresh reruns of `docker info` and `npm run test:e2e -- --grep "usage recordings"` both passed in the current environment with Docker available. The Docker-path assertion remains conditional on the runtime reporting docker mode, but the repository does include dedicated Docker-path coverage and it passed in this verifier run.

commands_run.summary: Confirmed the task changes are limited to task artifacts plus the expected frontend and e2e files.
No current diff in backend contract files, supporting the no-API-contract-change check.
Docker is available in the verifier environment.
Production build passed; Vite reported only a non-blocking chunk size warning.
All 3 targeted Playwright usage-recording tests passed in the current repository state.
